title: Senior Platform Engineer (AI Integration)
company_stage: Private, backed by Vista Equity Partners
description:
Securonix is leading the transformation of cybersecurity by
helping organizations stay ahead of modern threats. Security
teams are no longer constrained by data or tools. They are
constrained by speed, clarity, and confidence. Securonix was
built to close that gap. Our mission is to enable security
teams to decide and act faster across the entire threat
lifecycle.


The Securonix Unified Defense SIEM is the industry’s first
platform powered by agentic AI and designed with a human-in-
the-loop philosophy. It unifies detection, investigation,
and response in a single system. Advanced UEBA delivers deep
behavioral insight across users, entities, and data. Native
threat intelligence continuously enriches detections and
investigations with real-world context. AI reinforces every
layer of the platform while keeping accountability with the
security team.


Built cloud-native for scale and performance, the platform
enables real-time analytics, deep investigation, and
automated response without compromise. Analysts gain faster
access to relevant signals. Investigations move from days to
minutes. Response becomes consistent and measurable. The
result is a CyberOps experience that scales as threats
evolve.


Securonix is recognized as a six-time Leader in the Gartner
Magic Quadrant for SIEM and a Customers’ Choice on Gartner
Peer Insights. The company has been featured by leading
publications including WIRED, Dark Reading, and Fortune for
its innovation and leadership in security operations.
Organizations rely on the platform for always-available
data, rapid search and investigation, continuously updated
threat content, and a fully integrated Threat Detection,
Investigation, and Response experience.


Backed by Vista Equity Partners, one of the world’s leading
enterprise software investors, Securonix benefits from deep
operational expertise and a long-term commitment to
innovation and growth. This partnership strengthens our
ability to scale the platform, accelerate product execution,
and support customers as their security needs evolve.


With more than 1,000 customers worldwide, including a
meaningful portion of the Fortune 100, Securonix operates at
global scale. Our ecosystem of partners and managed security
service providers extends that reach, helping organizations
deploy and operate with confidence wherever they do
business. What drives us is how we work.

- We win as one team. We operate with trust, respect, and
  shared accountability.
- We are customer driven. Innovation is guided by real
  security challenges and measurable outcomes.
- We act with agility. Change is constant, and we stay aligned
  on purpose while adapting fast.

That focus is how Securonix helps organizations move from
reactive security to proactive, autonomous operations.

Summary -



The Engineer will be responsible for designing, deploying,
and automating AWS Infrastructure based on customer
requirements to deliver analytical solutions. This role will
work closely with Managers, Clients, and Managed Services
teams.



Role : Senior Platform Engineer

Location : Bengaluru

Total Experience: 5+ years

Relevant Experience: 5+ years



Responsibilities of the Role:

- Develop automation-first solutions for cloud data services
  provisioning, integrating IAM, networking, security
  policies as code, and observability from the ground up.

- Collaborate with developers and internal stakeholders to
  deliver automated, cloud-native, and AI-ready solutions.

- Implement fully automated, resilient, and observable
  infrastructure with FinOps best practices to enable cloud
  IaaS and PaaS services.

- Build and maintain Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and CI/CD
  pipelines for cloud data platforms, data pipelines, and
  infrastructure components.

- Enable AI-driven workflows for infrastructure monitoring,
  optimization, and predictive maintenance — experience in
  AI workflow orchestration will be a plus.

- Work extensively in POC environments to validate solutions
  before production rollouts.

- Deploy and manage AWS services like EC2, S3, RDS, VPC, DMS,
  Redis, EMR, EKS.

- Design and deploy multi-tier, auto-scaling, high-
  availability architectures in enterprise and cloud
  environments adhering to business continuity best
  practices.

- Estimate AWS usage costs and implement operational cost-
  control mechanisms.

- Deliver in areas such as cloud network administration,
  security administration, provisioning, optimization, and
  third-party software support.

- Implement cloud security best practices and assess partner
  compatibility.

- Continuously monitor and optimize servers, networks, and
  infrastructure components for performance and security.

- Troubleshoot and resolve infrastructure incidents with
  automation wherever possible.

- Conduct routine health checks and leverage automation for
  proactive issue detection.

- Participate in 24x7 on-call rotation to respond promptly to
  incidents.

- Lead initiatives to enhance infrastructure reliability,
  scalability, and performance.

- Maintain detailed documentation for automation workflows,
  system changes, and platform configurations.

Qualifications Required:



- Strong expertise in automation as a core skillset,
  leveraging IAC tools (Terraform preferred), CI/CD
  methodologies, and scripting (Python, Bash) to eliminate
  manual tasks.

- Experience with AI workflow integration in infrastructure
  automation (preferred ).

- Proficiency in AWS services, cloud-native security,
  monitoring, and logging tools, along with Well-Architected
  Framework principles.

- Strong background in the Hadoop ecosystem (HDFS, YARN,
  HBase, Kafka, Solr) and performance tuning.

- Solid understanding of Kubernetes and container
  orchestration.

- Experience designing, deploying, and securing high-
  availability cloud solutions with cost optimization in
  mind.

- Knowledge of cloud networking (subnets, routing, load
  balancing, firewalls, VPC, IAM, NACLs).

- Experience in cloud logging, monitoring, and observability
  tools.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to present
  automation strategies to technical and non-technical
  audiences.
- Good working knowledge of ITIL processes and best practices.
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related discipline

Benefits:



As a full-time employee with Securonix, you will be eligible
for the following employee benefits:



- Health Insurance with a total sum insured is INR 7,50,000
- Coverage: Self, Spouse, 2 kids, Dependent parents, or
  parents-in-law
- Personal Accident with total sum insured is INR 10,00,000
- Term Life Insurance with a sum assured for employees is 5
  times fixed base pay is covered.

Securonix provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to
all employees and applicants for employment without regard
to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender
identity, national origin, age, disability, genetic
information, marital status, amnesty or status as a covered
veteran in accordance with applicable federal, state and
local laws. Securonix complies with applicable state and
local laws governing nondiscrimination in employment in
every location where the company has facilities. This policy
applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including
hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall,
and transfer, leaves of absence, compensation and training.



Securonix expressly prohibits any form of unlawful employee
harassment based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual
orientation, national origin, age, genetic information,
disability or veteran status. Improper interference with the
ability of Securonix employees to perform their expected job
duties is absolutely not tolerated.
responsibilities: Develop automation-first solutions for cloud data services provisioning, integrating IAM, networking, security policies as code, and observability
Build and maintain Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and CI/CD pipelines for cloud data platforms, data pipelines, and infrastructure components
Deploy and manage AWS services like EC2, S3, RDS, VPC, DMS, Redis, EMR, EKS for multi-tier, auto-scaling, high-availability architectures
Implement cloud security best practices, partner compatibility assessments, and continuous monitoring for performance and security
Enable AI-driven workflows for infrastructure monitoring, optimization, and predictive maintenance with orchestration experience
Estimate AWS usage costs, implement FinOps best practices, and deliver on cloud network administration, security, and optimization
use_cases: SIEM (Security Information and Event Management) platform for cybersecurity
Threat detection, investigation, and response using agentic AI
Cloud-native data analytics and real-time security monitoring
User and Entity Behavior Analytics (UEBA) for security insights
Automated security response and threat intelligence enrichment
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role is a Senior Platform Engineer focused on AWS
infrastructure automation and cloud-native platform
delivery. While the company builds an AI-powered SIEM
product, this role involves building and maintaining the
infrastructure/platform that supports AI workflows rather
than directly building, training, or deploying AI/ML models.
The role mentions enabling AI-driven workflows as a nice-to-
have but the core responsibilities are infrastructure
provisioning, IaC, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud platform
operations.
